metadata.title: Design a research agent prompt for a local business site in South Asia that uses the failure_lens to identify and mitigate fake_test_risk, ensuring all outputs are governed by explicit validation gates and source policy limits.

mission.primary_objective: Design a research agent prompt for a local business site in South Asia that uses the failure_lens to identify and mitigate fake_test_risk, ensuring all outputs are governed by explicit validation gates and source policy limits.
mission.success_definition: The research agent prompt is compilable by SR8 into a valid objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, and output contract.; All validation gates are documented and enforceable at runtime.; No fake_test_risk data is propagated; any detected risk triggers a block with a clear reason.

in_scope.item: The prompt must operate within healthcare administration, focusing on local business site data. It must handle ambiguous, urgent, and partial input constraints while producing a structured artifact with objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, and output contract.

conflict_resolution.rule: SR8 canonical artifact fields override renderer defaults.
SRXML validation failures force blocked receipt state.

execution_contract.pipeline: raw_intent -> SR8 classification -> canonical artifact -> SRXML draft -> SRXML validation -> receipt

hard_constraints.item: Do not claim final sealed state from RC2 transform output.
Return blocked-state receipt when SR8 readiness is fail or intake is incomplete.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 1
gate.pass_condition: The research agent prompt is compilable by SR8 into a valid objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, and output contract.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 2
gate.pass_condition: All validation gates are documented and enforceable at runtime.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 3
gate.pass_condition: No fake_test_risk data is propagated; any detected risk triggers a block with a clear reason.

output_contract.completion_definition: Artifact parses as XML and passes SRXML RC2 static validation.

SRXML_Artifact.research_question: Design a research agent prompt for a local business site in South Asia that uses the failure_lens to identify and mitigate fake_test_risk, ensuring all outputs are governed by explicit validation gates and source policy limits.
SRXML_Artifact.search_strategy: The prompt must operate within healthcare administration, focusing on local business site data. It must handle ambiguous, urgent, and partial input constraints while producing a structured artifact with objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, and output contract.
SRXML_Artifact.evidence_standard: Record evidence limits and cite available sources.
SRXML_Artifact.citation_rules: Cite every external claim when external research is used.
SRXML_Artifact.final_report_contract: format: JSON; fields: artifact_type; depth_tier; runtime_target; should_block; blocked_reason; compiled_intent; validation: Each field must be present and conform to the schema. The compiled_intent must have all five sub-sections (Objective, Scope, Constraints, Success Criteria, Output Contract) with non-empty content.

validation.minimum_pass_standard: SR8 canonical validation must be recorded and SRXML static validation must pass.

validation_summary.sr8_summary: The raw_intent references a 'failure_lens' and 'fake_test_risk' as chaos input type, which implies deliberate injection of false or misleading test data. In a healthcare administration context in South Asia, this could violate patient safety, data integrity, and regulatory compliance (e.g., HIPAA-like local laws). The ambiguous acceptance criteria and missing context further increase risk of harm. Without explicit safeguards and verified source policy limits, compiling this prompt would be irresponsible. Blocked until a compliance evidence prompt and memory engrave prompt are generated to validate claims and constraints.

known_failure_modes.item: SR8 artifact classification cannot be represented by SRXML RC2.
SRXML static validation fails after rendering.

failure_handling.fallback_behavior: Return a blocked-state receipt and repair prompt instead of claiming executable success.
failure_handling.blocked_state: SR8 canonical validation status is fail.; SR8 governance flag marks the artifact incomplete.; SR8 governance flag requires human review.

required_repairs.item: SR8 canonical validation status is fail.
SR8 governance flag marks the artifact incomplete.
SR8 governance flag requires human review.

repair_prompt.resume_instruction: Repair canonical SR8 fields and rerun transform.

receipt.must_record: changed files, commands run, validation result, lineage
